<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT; use Lcobucci\JWT\Encoding\CannotDecodeContent; use Lcobucci\JWT\Token\InvalidTokenStructure; use Lcobucci\JWT\Token\UnsupportedHeaderFound; interface Parser { /** * Parses the JWT and returns a token * * @param non-empty-string $jwt * * @throws CannotDecodeContent When something goes wrong while decoding. * @throws InvalidTokenStructure When token string structure is invalid. * @throws UnsupportedHeaderFound When parsed token has an unsupported header. */ public function parse(string $jwt): Token; }
